findings.description: sys.exit() in library code — kills the entire process, prevents reuse
findings.fix_hint: Raise an exception instead; let the caller decide how to handle failure
findings.test_hint: Verify library functions raise exceptions instead of calling sys.exit()

findings.description: Silent exception swallowing — error caught but ignored
findings.fix_hint: At minimum log the error; better: handle or re-raise
findings.test_hint: Verify caught exceptions are logged or handled, not silently passed

findings.description: Catching broad Exception — masks bugs and makes debugging hard
findings.fix_hint: Catch specific exceptions (ValueError, TypeError, OSError) instead of Exception
findings.test_hint: Verify except clauses catch the narrowest possible exception type

findings.description: Global variable mutation — hard to test and reason about
findings.fix_hint: Pass state through function parameters or use a class
findings.test_hint: Verify global state is minimized and thread-safe if concurrent

findings.fix_hint: Always specify encoding='utf-8' for text file operations
findings.test_hint: Verify all text file opens specify explicit encoding

findings.description: Direct os.environ[] access crashes on missing key — use .get() with default
findings.fix_hint: Use os.environ.get('KEY', 'default') instead of os.environ['KEY']
findings.test_hint: Verify environment variable access has defaults for missing keys

findings.description: Code injection: eval/exec with potentially untrusted input
findings.fix_hint: Replace eval/exec with safe alternatives (ast.literal_eval, JSON.parse)
findings.test_hint: Verify no eval/exec is used on user-controlled data

findings.description: Silent exception swallowing — error caught but ignored
findings.fix_hint: At minimum log the error; better: handle or re-raise
findings.test_hint: Verify caught exceptions are logged or handled, not silently passed

findings.description: Catching broad Exception — masks bugs and makes debugging hard
findings.fix_hint: Catch specific exceptions (ValueError, TypeError, OSError) instead of Exception
findings.test_hint: Verify except clauses catch the narrowest possible exception type

findings.description: Debug print statement left in code — use logging instead
findings.fix_hint: Replace print() with logging.debug/info/warning as appropriate
findings.test_hint: Verify production code uses logging module instead of print()
